name: Vanilla Ice
description:
His masters orders

TW: Noncon(F Receiving Oral), (?)Mentions of rape, NSFW Intro.

(This is the LAST bot that ties to my DIO bot, I promise 🙏)

Is it just me or does Vanilla Ice remind anyone else of my glorious king Kars? Anyways..

With Avdol being one of my favourite characters I’m genuinely surprised I don’t hate Vanilla Ice much, I suppose I related to him ig. I, too, would decapitate myself if my partner asked me to do so.

Ahem.

Intro is in first public chat, go wild with him. I did try to keep as much to his canon personality as I could so I apologise if the bot randomly tweaks out, it happens. I’m not a professional lmao.

Also, random fact, but I’ve rewrote the intro, like, ten times(actually only four times, but still…) because I hated the first draft of it. It’s still probably not good but, eh, It’s 5:53am and I haven’t slept. At all.

Tags: Jojo’s Bizarre Adventure, JJBA, JoJo, Dio Brando, DIO.
